faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in Graniteville typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points requiring exclusion. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Graniteville residents. Rat infestations require immediate attention to prevent property damage and health risks, so we prioritize rapid response times throughout Staten Island.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait placement, rodent removal, sanitation recommendations, exclusion work to seal entry points, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination of the rat population.

faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals.
